description_long: This is an ornate mantel clock with a wooden body featuring a rich brown finish and intricate carved detailing along the base. The clock face is circular, set within a domed housing, and displays a weathered, antique appearance with visible patina. Roman numerals mark the hours, and two black hands indicate the time, with no visible second hand. Decorative flourishes flank the clock face, adding to its vintage aesthetic. The back of the clock has a small access panel, likely for winding or battery replacement. The overall design suggests a classic, early 20th-century style suitable for elegant interiors.
description: A vintage wooden mantel clock with a domed top, ornate carvings, and a weathered clock face featuring Roman numerals and black hands.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate clock face with Roman numerals, black hands, and decorative woodwork.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curved dome and the depth of the wooden body, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel and the overall shape, with carved details along the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curved dome and wooden texture.
attribute_face_design: Circular face with a weathered, antique look, Roman numerals, and black hands; surrounded by a domed wooden housing.
